paneContent:
в—Џ Start hub conversation (shell)
  в”‚ cd /Users/dfosco/workspace/storyboard-core/worktrees/0.5.0--messaging-bus && npx
  в”‚ storyboard hub conversation start --hub hub_b425ff2f2f --sender agent-l6yv3q
  в”” 6 lines...

в—Џ Now let me send the initial prompt to both peers.

в—Џ Send initial hub message (shell)
  в”‚ cd /Users/dfosco/workspace/storyboard-core/worktrees/0.5.0--messaging-bus && npx
  в”‚ storyboard hub send --hub hub_b425ff2f2f --sender agent-l6yv3q --body "Hey team!
  в”‚ We're writing a short markdown document on **How to Create Sustainable Design
  в”‚ Systems**. Here's the plan:вЂ¦
  в”” 32 lines...

в—Џ Message sent. Tokens dispatched to both peers. Now I'll poll for their responses.

в—Џ Poll for peer responses (shell)
  в”‚ cd /Users/dfosco/workspace/storyboard-core/worktrees/0.5.0--messaging-bus &&
  в”‚ CHANNEL="hub--storyboarding--terminal-bus--hub_b425ff2f2f" && echo "Polling for
  в”‚ responses..." && for i in $(seq 1 30); do MSGS=$(npx storyboard messages read
  в”‚ --channel "$CHANNEL" --since 01KQQJKZ8ST1XDRAXGW90A58C9 2>/dev/null); COUNT=$(echo
  в”‚ "$MSGS" | jq '[.events[] | select(.payload.type == "hub:response")] | length' вЂ¦
  в”” 8 lines...

в—‹ Starting hub conversation (Esc to cancel В· 5.8 KiB)
 ~/workspace/storyboard-core/worktrees/0.5.0--messaging-bus [вЋ‡ 0.5.0--messaging-bus*%]
